area.value: piercing or slashing manufactured weapon touched

description.value: This spell is available to followers of the Horseman of War. The target weapon turns a glossy black color and deals bleed damage if it deals hit point damage to a creature. The amount of bleed damage is equal to 1/2 your caster level (maximum bleed 5). Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Adventure Path #71: Rasputin Must Die!
